assertions.description: Board dimensions 120.5x85.48mm match the physical board. The 8 NPTH mounting holes (5 M2.2 for stabilizers/spacers and 3 M3.2 mounting holes) are correctly classified. Empty F.Cu/B.Cu/F.Paste/B.Paste are correctly identified as zero-aperture files, appropriate for a non-electrical plate.
